prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T4 work setting, the evaluated element is A-101 Timing & mechanical within 2.9 Automotive & Powertrain. The relevant subcategory is 2.9.1 Engine & Drivetrain. title: T4 A-101 Measurement & estimation
